scripts.electron-dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.electron-dev:offline: cross-env VITE_DEMO_MODE=true NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.dist: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win dir --x64
scripts.dist:final: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win dir --x64 --config.directories.output=release-final
scripts.dist:final:installer: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --config.directories.output=release-final
scripts.dist:offline: npm run build:offline && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win portable --x64 --config.directories.output=release-offline
scripts.dist:offline:dir: npm run build:offline && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win dir --x64 --config.directories.output=release-offline
